title: Consumer Lifecycle, Cancellation, Readiness, and Graceful Shutdown · Guided Contract Studio
summary: A messaging pairing room predicts publisher, exchange, queue, consumer, ownership, and failure transitions before assembling the first consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine for consumer lifecycle, cancellation, readiness, and graceful shutdown. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pra…
objectives: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready.
Track consumer tags and channel generations so stale cancellation, delivery, and close events cannot mutate current state.
Handle a null delivery callback and cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Consume Registration Readiness
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop messaging team handles case 7589 in a canary consumer reading old and new envelope versions. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then add one subscriber responsibility without changing publisher intent. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Consume Registration Readiness.

hints: For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Workshop Shutdown Ack Policy, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Shutdown Ack Policy precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Workshop Shutdown Ack Policy, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A workshop messaging team handles case 2541 in a canary consumer reading old and new envelope versions. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then introduce a sequence gap for one partition while another stays healthy. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Workshop Shutdown Ack Policy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Acknowledging every in-flight message during shutdown prevents both loss and duplicates.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Defend the transferred model · Workshop Shutdown Ack Policy
steps.instruction:
Write the workshop evidence note for Shutdown Ack Policy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A workshop messaging team handles case 9922 in a canary consumer reading old and new envelope versions. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Defend the transferred model · Workshop Shutdown Ack Policy.
